ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date_played" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., Home, Away) */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Team played against */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "game_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the game in minutes */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., Regular Season, Playoff, Preseason) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the game was played in */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of fans attending the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "slug" TEXT /* Player's slug (e.g., randoza01) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Player's full name */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., PG, SG, SF, PF, C) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height (e.g., 6'9") */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Player's birthdate */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country of origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game stat */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the stat belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the stat belongs to */,
  "seconds_played" INTEGER /* Seconds played in the game */,
  "made_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals made */,
  "attempted_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of field goals attempted */,
  "made_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals made */,
  "attempted_three_point_field_goals" INTEGER /* Number of three-point field goals attempted */,
  "made_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "attempted_free_throws" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  "total_points_scored" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "draftkings_points" (
  "dk_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DraftKings point */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the point belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the point belongs to */,
  "draftkings_points" REAL /* DraftKings points earned */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Player's salary for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dk_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draftkings_points_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_draftkings_points_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "triple_doubles" (
  "td_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each triple-double */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the triple-double belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the triple-double belongs to */,
  "triple_double_flag" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the player achieved a triple-double (1) or not (0) */,
  "triple_double_type" TEXT /* Type of triple-double achieved (e.g., points, rebounds, and assists) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("td_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_triple_doubles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_triple_doubles_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "page_visited" TEXT /* Page visited by the user (e.g., game summary, player stats) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Team name */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Team abbreviation (e.g., BOS, LAL) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Team location (e.g., Boston, Los Angeles) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Team conference (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Team division (e.g., Atlantic, Pacific) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., knee, ankle) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award (e.g., MVP, Rookie of the Year) */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_coaches" (
  "game_coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game coach */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the coach belongs to */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "coach_role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coaches_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coaches_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Coach's name */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
